leads.name: Ahuja Retail
leads.priorityReason: The customer asked twice about bulk pricing and requested delivery availability.
leads.next: Call today and mention the bulk discount.
leads.whatsappMessage: Hi Ahuja Retail, thank you for your interest in our formal shirts. We can offer special bulk pricing for your requested quantity. Please let us know a convenient time to discuss the order.

leads.name: Kapoor Uniforms
leads.priorityReason: They shared an exact quantity and need delivery before the new school term.
leads.next: Confirm production capacity and call today.

leads.name: Gupta Garments
leads.priorityReason: The buyer reviewed the first estimate and requested revised pricing for a larger order.

leads.name: Mehta Fashions
leads.priorityReason: They confirmed sizes and colours and are waiting for a formal price.
leads.next: Send quotation with festive collection pricing.

leads.name: Royal Menswear
leads.priorityReason: The quotation was viewed twice and the customer asked about delivery timing.

leads.name: Singh Apparels
leads.priorityReason: Their quotation is due for follow-up and stock for the requested sizes is limited.
leads.next: Send a WhatsApp reminder about stock availability.

leads.name: Verma Retail Co.
leads.priorityReason: The buyer accepted the product mix and is waiting for final payment terms.
leads.next: Confirm the order and mark as won.
